@everyone

Surge - Test for Rewards on April 20

Combat, rewards and glory. 

Introducing Surge, a new faction vs. faction vs. faction game mode. Crush your enemies, score points and bring glory to your faction. Play for rewards on April 20. 

Need an access key to help test? Request one in ⁠No Access.

 | Trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SuvL4tP57Q4
